replay_manifest.ordinary_training_rule: train on ordinary corpus-matrix rows excluding the target corpus
replay_manifest.control_training_rule: train on all ordinary corpus-matrix rows
replay_manifest.promotion_rule: ordinary negative groups >= 3, control negative groups == 0, and canonical selected spans beat sha256 baseline

summary.claim_boundary: No Seed Search; bounded preset replay only; not natural-corpus proof; not production proof; not .tlmr format support.
summary.conclusion: Replay can reopen the seed-table lane only if unrelated ordinary negative groups appear while controls remain null. The artifact is evidence for mechanism triage, not a compression or format claim.
